desc: Allows users to run a trigger that has its permission type set to named\_entities

errors.channel_not_found: One or more of the listed channels could not be found.
errors.connected_org_denied: The workspace admin does not allow connected organizations to be named\_entities.
errors.connected_team_denied: The workspace admin does not allow connected teams to be named\_entities.
errors.connected_user_denied: The workspace admin does not allow connected users to be named\_entities.
errors.invalid_permission_type: This trigger requires permission\_type to be set as named\_entities before adding users.
errors.no_valid_named_entities: None of the provided named entities were valid
errors.org_not_connected: One of more of the listed organizations were not connected.
errors.org_not_found: One or more of the listed organizations could not be found.
errors.shared_channel_denied: The workspace admin does not allow shared channels to be named\_entities.
errors.team_not_connected: One of more of the listed teams were not connected by org.
errors.team_not_found: One or more of the listed teams could not be found.
errors.too_many_named_entities: Too many named entities passed into the trigger permissions setting.
errors.user_not_found: One or more of the listed users could not be found.
